pi_items.source: Task difficulty is a subjective metric and cannot be objectively verified against empirical data.
Task description strictly directs the agent to act as a facility planner, matching the verifier.py role context.
Task description requires designing an emergency communications center, exactly matching the verifier.py industry context.
verifier.py final evaluation logic strictly enforces passed = score >= 70.
verifier.py allocates 20 (C1) + 20 (C2) + 15 (C3) + 15 (C4) + 30 (C5) points, summing exactly to 100.
setup_task.sh explicitly generates this exact file by stripping furniture from SweetHome3DExample7.sh3d and placing it in /home/ga/Documents/SweetHome3D/.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated empty building shell ('dispatch_starter.sh3d'), dynamically created by a Python script in setup_task.sh that removes all furniture from the official Sweet Home 3D Gallery sample 'SweetHome3DExample7.sh3d'. The agent role ('Facility Planner') and industry ('Public Safety / Emergency Services') exactly match the task description and verifier context. The scoring logic in verifier.py confirms a maximum total of 100 points and a pass threshold of exactly 70 points.
